task.title: Carve a Pumpkin
task.shortdesc: This task explains how to carve a pumpkin for Halloween decoration.

prereq.p: You will need the following items:

ul.li: A carving knife or pumpkin carving tool

context.p: Pumpkin carving is a traditional Halloween activity that involves cutting a design into a pumpkin and placing a light inside it.

step.cmd: Cut an opening in the top of the pumpkin.

info.p: Angle the knife slightly inward to prevent the lid from falling in.

step.cmd: Scoop out the seeds and pulp.
Draw a design on the pumpkin.

info.p: You can draw a face or any simple shape.

note.p: Cut away from your hands to avoid injury.

step.cmd: Place a light inside the pumpkin and replace the lid.

result.p: The pumpkin is carved and ready to be displayed.

postreq.p: Dispose of pumpkin scraps and clean the tools after use.
